body.title: Layer 3 brick: PARSE_GOAL engram
body.result: All 8 Layer 3 TEMPLATE nodes seeded with full tests (1305 passing). Session 2026-04-01h.
body.description: Design and seed PARSE_GOAL as a TEMPLATE Memory node. Extracts actual intent from input, distinct from literal surface meaning. Emits parsed_goal and confidence to basket. Layer 3 cognitive stdlib (D297). Prerequisite for DECOMPOSE.
